completed_slice: Added and locally verified a single-command, fail-closed environment preflight runner that generates both the workflow contract and bounded secret-free preflight packet from committed inputs.
rollback_route: Revert commits in reverse order; no file or history deletion is required.
remaining_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secrets, followed by exact-commit workflow execution and retained deployment proof.
next_action: Wire cloudflare-static/run-environment-preflight.mjs into .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml before readiness probing, include both generated JSON files in the uploaded evidence bundle, and dispatch only after environment configuration is present.
